headline: Cyberdecks used to look like little laptops, but now they’re getting more personal
summary: DIYers are transforming cyberdecks into hidden, personalized tech. TikToker Annike Tan went viral with a mermaid-themed cyberdeck made inside a purse. The trend shifts from clunky laptops to discreet, custom designs.

headline: Kevin O’Leary agrees to downsize massive Utah data center
summary: Kevin O'Leary agreed to halve his planned 40,000-acre Utah data center project. The decision follows mounting pressure from residents and activists. He will remove 19,430 acres from the controversial development.

headline: Google is letting social media stars customize their search result page
summary: Google now offers dedicated Search profiles for major creators and publishers in the US. This feature allows them to highlight videos, articles, and other online presences. It's limited to users with at least 100,000 followers on YouTube, Instagram, or X.

headline: Amazon’s new plan for games: James Bond and AI Snoop Dogg
summary: Amazon is refocusing its gaming strategy on recognizable franchises. Upcoming plans include games based on James Bond and featuring AI Snoop Dogg. This leverages content from Prime Video and the MGM Studios library.

headline: The Witness Review
summary: Netflix's true crime miniseries 'The Witness' offers a compelling review. It depicts the emotional aftermath of a real-life murder. The story is seen through the eyes of the victim's 3-year-old son.

headline: Save 50% Off the TSA-Approved Talix 20,000mAh 140W Power Bank, Now Just $44.99
summary: Get 50% off the TSA-Approved Talix 20,000mAh 140W Power Bank, now priced at $44.99. This rebadged Lenovo model offers powerful charging capabilities. It can fast charge handheld gaming PCs and laptops.

headline: The Popular AstroAI S8 Cordless Car Jump Starter Drops Below $20 in Time for Father's Day Delivery
summary: The AstroAI S8 Cordless Car Jump Starter is now available for under $20. It's an ideal and affordable gift for Father's Day, with timely delivery. This practical gadget ensures dads are prepared for unexpected car issues.

headline: The Powerful Sofirn High-Powered LED Flashlights Drop to the Lowest Prices of the Year Ahead of Father's Day
summary: Sofirn high-powered LED flashlights are at their lowest prices of the year. They offer practical and affordable gift options for Father's Day. These flashlights combine usefulness with a high coolness factor for dads.

headline: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham states he would enter any Labour leadership contest. He would first need to win the upcoming by-election in Makerfield. Burnham positions himself as a potential future leader for the Labour party.

headline: Royal Navy crew killed in helicopter crash named
summary: The Royal Navy has named the crew members killed in a recent helicopter crash. Tributes were paid to Lt Cdr Chris Gayson (42), Lt Lily-Mae Fisher (31), and Petty Officer Owen Green (24). The tragic incident has led to a national outpouring of grief.

headline: Henry Nowak deserves legacy that goes beyond tragedy, says PM
summary: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer met with the family of Henry Nowak. The PM stated that Nowak deserves a legacy beyond the tragedy of his death. The meeting took place at 10 Downing Street, underscoring the case's significance.

headline: How misinformation about student's murder sent two people into hiding
summary: Misinformation surrounding student Henry Nowak's murder forced two individuals into hiding. A former police officer, wrongly identified at the scene, expressed fear for her safety. The case highlights the severe impact of false information spreading online.
